tasks.question: What is the competition stage, round, and importance of this match?
Who is the referee and what is the officiating profile for this match?
Are there injuries, suspensions, or important absences for both teams?
What are the expected starting lineups and rotation risks?
What is the recent form (last 5 matches) of both teams?
What is the head-to-head history between the teams?
What is the travel load and location impact for both teams?
What does the current model/value layer indicate for this match?

summary.el: Sport - Operário PR: ανάλυση με βάση ιστορικά και διαθέσιμα δεδομένα. Sport: 0-3-2 στα τελευταία 5. Operário PR: 4-0-1 στα τελευταία 5. Η πρόσφατη φόρμα δίνει ελαφρύ προβάδισμα στους φιλοξενούμενους. Το historical layer βασίστηκε σε 1981 διαθέσιμες εγγραφές αγώνων. Στα τελευταία 4 μεταξύ τους: Sport 1 νίκες, ισοπαλίες 1, Operário PR 2 νίκες. Το H2H γέρνει προς τους φιλοξενούμενους. Το H2H δείχνει τάση για πιο ανοιχτά παιχνίδια. Βαθμολογικό context: Sport=europe, Operário PR=title. Απουσίες: Sport=severe, Operário PR=moderate. Lineup context: Sport=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Operário PR=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:stable. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο team news context στο enriched snapshot. Υπάρχει διαθέσιμο lineup context στο enriched snapshot.
summary.en: Sport vs Operário PR: contextual analysis using historical and available data. Sport: 0-3-2 across the last 5. Operário PR: 4-0-1 across the last 5. Recent form gives a slight edge to the away side. The historical layer was based on 1981 available match records. Across the last 4 head-to-head meetings: Sport 1 wins, draws 1, Operário PR 2 wins. The head-to-head profile leans toward the away side. The head-to-head profile points toward more open games. Table context: Sport=europe, Operário PR=title. Absences: Sport=severe, Operário PR=moderate. Lineup context: Sport=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:reduced; Operário PR=fatigue:low, rotation:low, strength:stable. Team news context is available in the enriched snapshot. Lineup context is available in the enriched snapshot.
